item.title: The Strait of Volatility: Navigating the New Middle East Stand-off
item.description:
Presenter: en-GB-SoniaNeural

  • Middle East crisis liveTrump pausing strikes on Iran energy sites; Houthis say ‘no reason’ to halt Red Sea shippingUS president says he is extending deadline for strait of Hormuz to reopen to 6 April; Houthis tell Lloyd’s List ‘no reason’ to prevent Saudi oil using Red Sea route
  • Middle East crisis‘Tehran’s tollbooth’: a visual guide to how a trickle of ships still passes through strait of HormuzMany of the vessels willing to make the crossing are taking an alternative route through Iranian waters
  • Iran war: Trump extends pause on energy site strikes
item.itunes:author: en-GB-SoniaNeural

item.title: Old Trafford Evolution: The Summer Strategy Unveiled
item.description:
Presenter: en-US-GuyNeural

  • Man Utd to make 'formal approach' for £80m star after Bruno Fernandes endorsement
  • Man Utd hold initial talks over move for Barcelona star amid Marcus Rashford standoff
  • Manchester United receive approach from Premier League rivals for Marcus Rashford
  • Manchester United enter race to sign Tottenham star with £52m transfer clause
  • Harry Maguire makes Ruben Amorim 'next club' prediction after Manchester United exit
  • Man Utd to make 'formal approach' for £80m star after Fernandes endorsement
item.itunes:author: en-US-GuyNeural

item.title: The Tech Reckoning: When Innovation Meets Accountability
item.description:
Presenter: en-AU-NatashaNeural

  • Analysis‘Accountability has arrived’: dual US court losses show shifting tide against Meta and co
  • TechnologyGoogle warns quantum computers could hack encrypted systems by 2029
  • Meta and YouTube found negligent in landmark social media addiction case.→
  • Meta lays off 700 employees, while rewarding top executives.→
  • OpenAI is shutting sown Sora, its A.I. video generator.→
  • Snapchat investigated in Europe over child safety policies.→
item.itunes:author: en-AU-NatashaNeural

item.title: The Cruel Calculus of the Spot Kick: A Post-Mortem on International Heartbreak
item.description:
Presenter: en-IE-ConnorNeural

  • FootballWales agony as Bosnia and Herzegovina win penalty shootout to end World Cup hopes
  • FootballRepublic of Ireland dreams end in shootout heartbreak after Krejci rescues Czechs
  • Ireland suffer penalty heartbreak in Prague as Czech Republic march on to playoff final
  • Czech Republic v Ireland: Heartbreak for Ireland as they lose on penalties - as it happened
  • Sammie Szmodics to remain in hospital in Prague as Ireland’s World Cup dream ends
  • Ireland suffer penalty heartbreak in Prague as Czech Republic march on to playoff final
item.itunes:author: en-IE-ConnorNeural

item.title: The Irish Paradox: Growth, Debt, and the Cracks in the Foundation
item.description:
Presenter: en-GB-RyanNeural

  • Bank judgment mortgages registered against Meath site where house was demolished
  • Department of Education’s €600m overspend to be bailed out by other departments’ budgets
  • At the Rock of Cashel, a ‘lovely development’ of 52 unfinished houses will be destroyed
  • Potential €4bn in pension liabilities hang over State transport group looking to the future
  • Tesco secures permanent order preventing couple from trespassing on development site
item.itunes:author: en-GB-RyanNeural

item.title: Accountability: The High Cost of Failure
item.description:
Presenter: en-CA-LiamNeural

  • BanksNS&I boss forced out as bank faces £470m payout over missing savingsPensions minister promises the ‘full truth’ as external advisers are hired to identify the scale of the errors
  • Lucy LetbyDavid Davis says Cheshire police made ‘egregious’ failures in Letby investigation
  • Dublin-based woman suspected of killing husband and daughter in Iceland told police she was ‘a monster’
  • Three children in same family secure €3.6m after settling cases over epilepsy drug
  • Bank ordered to reveal names of illegal Premier League streaming users to Sky
item.itunes:author: en-CA-LiamNeural

item.title: Silicon Pulse: The State of the AI Frontier
item.description:
Presenter: en-GB-SoniaNeural

  • Telling an AI model that it’s an expert programmer makes it a worse programmerResearchers say persona-based prompting can improve works for safety but not for factsTue 24 Mar 2026
  • Google unleashes Gemini AI agents on the dark webClaims it can analyze millions of daily events with 98 percent accuracyMon 23 Mar 2026
  • GitHub hits CTRL-Z, decides it will train its AI with user data after allAs of April 24 you'll be feeding the Octocat unless you opt outThu 26 Mar 2026
  • Anthropic tweaks timed usage limits to discourage Claude demand during peak hoursAI biz makes some Claude conversations more costly to manage capacityThu 26 Mar 2026
  • AI bug reports went from junk to legit overnight, says Linux kernel czarGreg Kroah-Hartman can't explain the inflection point, but it's not slowing down or going awayThu 26 Mar 2026
  • CERN eggheads burn AI into silicon to stem data delugeThe operating system of the universe isn’t going to debug itselfSun 22 Mar 2026
  • Elon Musk wants to build 50 times more chips than the world currently produces, using 'new physics'Like his promise to get a million robocabs on the road, this doesn't add upMon 23 Mar 2026
item.itunes:author: en-GB-SoniaNeural

item.title: The Patchwork Paradox: Navigating Microsoft’s Reliability Crisis
item.description:
Presenter: en-US-GuyNeural

  • Microsoft breaks Microsoft account sign-ins in Windows 11 with latest updateOneDrive, Office, Teams Free users greeted with phantom 'no internet' errors, restart may help if you're luckyFri 20 Mar 2026
  • Microsoft: Removing some Copilots will improve Windows 11'Doze boss admits quality is down, promises smaller memory footprint and fixes for many well-known issuesMon 23 Mar 2026
  • Microsoft fixes broken Windows update days after vowing fewer broken updatesThe era of reliability begins... right after this out-of-band patchMon 23 Mar 2026
  • Windows 95 let installers trash its files then fixed the mess behind their backsI'll just clear up that up, shall I?Wed 25 Mar 2026
item.itunes:author: en-US-GuyNeural

item.title: The Infrastructure Pulse: Cloud Shifts and Sovereign Realities
item.description:
Presenter: en-AU-NatashaNeural

  • SAP already shifting focus from ERP migration disaster in pursuit of AI-driven growthNew commercial models planned after cloud transition falls €2B behind targetTue 24 Mar 2026
  • HMRC hands £473M Fujitsu migration deal to AWS after competition melts awayInsiders say single-bidder process left little room for negotiationWed 25 Mar 2026
  • Age checks creep into Linux as systemd gets a DOB fieldFlatpak may be next, and the lobbying behind it is raising eyebrowsTue 24 Mar 2026
  • UK to rethink tech buying after Palantir contractsGovernment looks for sovereign tech as NHS deal nears break clauseFri 20 Mar 2026
  • Open source isn't a tip jar – it's time to charge for accessA handful thrive, most scrape by as companies make billions off their codeWed 25 Mar 2026
  • Half of VMware users plan to reduce usage by 2028Silent exodus brewing but other customers say they feel trappedTue 24 Mar 2026
  • Cryptographers engage in war of words over RustSec bug reports and subsequent banRust security maintainers contend Nadim Kobeissi's vulnerability claims are too muchFri 20 Mar 2026
  • LiteLLM loses game of Trivy pursuit, gets compromisedPython interface for LLMs infected with malware via polluted CI/CD pipelineTue 24 Mar 2026
item.itunes:author: en-AU-NatashaNeural

item.title: The Silicon Fault Line: Trade, Trust, and Technical Failure
item.description:
Presenter: en-IE-ConnorNeural

  • Junior disobeyed orders and tried untested feature during a live robot demoFirst came the facepalm, then the faceplant, then the loss of faceMon 23 Mar 2026
  • Country that put backdoors into Cisco routers to spy on world bans foreign routersUnfortunately, there aren't many options unless you're StarlinkTue 24 Mar 2026
  • Jaguar Land Rover's cyber bailout sets worrying precedent, watchdog warnsLack of clear criteria risks encouraging firms to lean on state support instead of worrying about insuranceFri 20 Mar 2026
  • Supermicro co-founder arrested, charged over $2.5B Nvidia GPU sales to ChinaIndictment claims dummy servers and bogus docs used to slip past US export controlsFri 20 Mar 2026
  • Sorry, Amazon, you couldn't pick a worse time to bring a phone to market: IDC analystThe market is contractingFri 20 Mar 2026
  • Samsung still glued to its bad habits with Galaxy S26 UltraFlagship phone scores 5/10 from iFixit as the parts that break most often remain firmly out of reachWed 25 Mar 2026
item.itunes:author: en-IE-ConnorNeural

item.title: Orbital Perspectives: From Gray Matter to Lunar Taxis
item.description:
Presenter: en-GB-RyanNeural

  • Turns out your coffee addiction may be doing your brain a favorDecades of data suggest people who stick to a couple of brews fare better in terms of gray matterSat 21 Mar 2026
  • Head-mounted VR hardware will never happen, says Neal Stephenson - who coined the term ‘metaverse’‘People don’t like wearing things on their faces and don’t trust those who do’Tue 24 Mar 2026
  • NASA sets 'impossible' ground rules for relocation of 'flown space vehicle'Draft Request for Proposals says you can move shuttle orbiter but you cannot break itMon 23 Mar 2026
  • Starship may chauffeur Orion to the Moon, as NASA mulls ditching SLS after Artemis VSpaceX's still-not-quite-orbital rocket tapped as lunar taxi. Musk's minicab anyone?Fri 20 Mar 2026
item.itunes:author: en-GB-RyanNeural
